use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY COMPRISING THE STEP OF NASALLY ADMINISTERING TO A PATIENT IN NEED OF SUCH TREATMENT AN EFFECTIVE AMOUNT OF TESTOSTERONE GEL FORMULATION.
NASAL ADMINISTRATION OF A TESTOSTERONE GEL TO A PATIENT TO TREAT THE PATIENT FOR A CONDITION ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE
